What if I had a thing that let me …

or download and build your own

??? questions ???

MINDS lets you build your own little software — tools, dashboards, toys — just by describing what you want. An agent sketches the thing while you watch, wires it to your real accounts (gmail, slack, calendar, your editor…), and you keep and tweak whatever you like.
Say what you want in plain language — “a fuck-you button for slack,” “auto-delete these emails,” “a to-do list that pulls from everything.” The agent drafts it live in the preview, you refine it in the chat, and it becomes a real app in your workspace.
Because most software is one-size-fits-all, and the tools you actually want rarely exist as products. MINDS makes personal software cheap enough to build for an audience of one — you.

try it in minds now
